hero.title: Here For
hero.subtitle: We walk with you for years in Eskişehir with digital dentistry, an ethical approach and a patient-centered understanding.

story.title: How Did
story.p1: Dentpol Söğütönü Oral and Dental Health Clinic was founded with the dream of creating a clinic where patients are truly valued, properly informed, and where modern technology meets human warmth.
story.p2: Led by Dr. Esra Nehir Altıçek, our clinic opened its doors in Eskişehir Söğütönü in 2018 and quickly became one of the region's trusted healthcare addresses with its team specialized in implantology, aesthetic dentistry, orthodontics and digital smile design.
story.p3: Today, we continue our journey with thousands of happy patients and a continuously updated technological infrastructure. We see each patient as an individual and prepare treatment plans tailored to each person.

items.title: Ethical Practice
items.desc: We build trust by always providing honest, transparent and scientifically-based information to our patients.

items.title: Digital Pioneer
items.desc: We lead the industry with 3D scanners, CAD/CAM systems and digital smile design.

items.title: Patient Comfort
items.desc: Our clinic offers a carefully designed environment to reduce anxiety and increase peace of mind.

items.title: Personalized Treatment
items.desc: Every patient has a different oral structure, expectations and lifestyle. The treatment plan is shaped accordingly.

items.title: Sterilization Priority
items.desc: All instruments are sterilized in accordance with international protocols to keep patient safety at the highest level.

items.title: Continuous Improvement
items.desc: Our team keeps itself constantly up-to-date with congresses, specialization trainings and scientific publications.

cta.title: Take the First Step
cta.subtitle: Meet our expert team, ask your questions and let us create your personalized treatment plan.

hero.title: Comprehensive
hero.subtitle: From implants to aesthetic dentistry, from orthodontics to root canal — we are by your side with a wide range of expertise.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.shortDesc: Permanent, natural, and aesthetic solution for missing teeth that feels closest to natural roots.
items.longDesc: Dental implant therapy consists of placing biocompatible titanium posts into the jawbone to serve as artificial roots replacing lost teeth. Once the implant fuses with the bone (osseointegration), standard crowns or bridges are secured, recreating a highly durable dental foundation that restores maximum chewing comfort and identical aesthetics.
benefits: Saves neighboring teeth from reduction
Closest chewing feel to a natural tooth
Prevents progressive jawbone resorption
Extremely durable, lifetime solution

items.title: Impacted Tooth Extraction
items.shortDesc: Safe surgical extraction of non-erupting wisdom teeth and other impacted teeth.
items.longDesc: Surgical tooth extraction refers to the removal of teeth that remain fully or partially beneath the jawbone or gum line. Often necessary for impacted wisdom teeth that lack space to erupt, this clinical procedure prevents severe localized pain, cysts, infections, and structural damage or crowding to adjacent dental roots.
benefits: Eliminates pain and swelling hazards
Protects neighboring molar roots
Removes active infection focus
Avoids orthodontic dental crowding

items.title: Zygomatic Implants
items.shortDesc: Innovative zygomatic implants anchored in the cheekbone for patients with severe bone loss.
items.longDesc: Zygomatic implants are specialized, longer implants used for rehabilitation of patients presenting with extreme upper jawbone atrophy. Instead of anchoring into the jawbone, they are secured directly into the stable cheekbone (zygoma). This eliminates the need for traumatic, long bone grafting procedures, allowing immediate loading.
benefits: No sinus lift or bone grafting needed
Fixed teeth on the same treatment day
Solves extreme upper jawbone resorption
Safe, highly predictable clinical protocol

items.title: Root Canal
items.shortDesc: Microscopic endodontic treatment to save infected or deeply decayed teeth painlessly.
items.longDesc: Root canal therapy (endodontics) is performed to salvage a natural tooth whose pulp (inner nerve and vascular tissue) has become inflamed or infected due to deep decay, repeated dental procedures, or structural fractures. The pulp cavity is thoroughly cleaned, shaped, disinfected, and filled hermetically using specialized biocompatible sealers.
benefits: Saves and keeps your natural tooth
Damps acute throbbing toothache entirely
Stops infections from spreading to jawbone
Eliminates need for immediate extraction

items.title: Orthodontic Treatment
items.shortDesc: Correction of crowded teeth and jaw relationships using metal or aesthetic braces.
items.longDesc: Traditional orthodontics focuses on correcting dental crowding, malocclusions, gap closures, and overall discrepancies between the upper and lower jaw relationships. Utilizing highly calibrated metal braces or aesthetic sapphire/porcelain brackets, teeth are gradually guided into their optimal biological alignment, enhancing both facial balance and chewing function.
benefits: Resolves mild-to-severe dental crowding
Enhances speech and chewing ability
Facilitates effortless brushing and flossing
Improves overall symmetric smile aesthetics

items.title: Clear Aligners (Invisalign)
items.shortDesc: Comfortable teeth straightening with completely invisible and removable transparent aligners.
items.longDesc: Clear aligners (such as Invisalign) are state-of-the-art orthodontic systems utilizing a series of computer-designed, medical-grade transparent thermoplastic trays. Changed every few weeks, each customized tray shifts teeth incrementally. Because they are removable, they provide unmatched hygiene, comfort, and zero food restrictions.
benefits: Completely invisible, highly aesthetic
Trays are removable for meals and events
Superior oral hygiene and easy brushing
No sharp brackets or poking wires

items.title: Pediatric Dentistry
items.shortDesc: Preventive services, decay protection, fluoride, and deciduous tooth fillings tailored for children.
items.longDesc: Pedodontics covers specialized oral care for infants, children, and adolescents. Our primary goal is to ensure a positive, play-supported, and fear-free dental experience. By applying protective fluoride gels, fissure sealants on permanent molars, and pediatric deciduous restorations, we help children transition into adulthood with optimal oral health.
benefits: Prevents early dental anxiety or phobias
Strengthens children's enamel against decay
Protects temporary baby teeth to guide daimi teeth
Instills healthy daily brushing habits early

items.title: Gum Treatment
items.shortDesc: Professional gum therapy for gingivitis or periodontitis causing bleeding, recession, and bone loss.
items.longDesc: Periodontology focuses on diagnosing and treating inflammatory diseases affecting the gums and supporting bone tissues. Ranging from basic gingivitis (swelling, bleeding gums) to advanced periodontitis (bone loss, tooth mobility), we treat conditions through deep scaling, root planing (cleaning beneath the gums), and periodontal surgery.
benefits: Cures bleeding gums and chronic halitosis
Controls severe gum recession
Prevents progressive alveolar bone loss
Saves loose teeth from premature extraction

items.title: Air Flow Clean
items.shortDesc: Deep removal of all stains, plaque, and discolorations on teeth with air-water-powder pressure.
items.longDesc: Air Flow is an advanced cosmetic cleaning system designed to remove tough surface stains caused by smoking, tea, coffee, and red wine, alongside soft plaque biofilms. A high-pressure jet blending water, compressed air, and fine sodium bicarbonate powder sweeps hard-to-reach interdental spaces without scratching enamel, leaving teeth instantly clean.
benefits: Quickly lifts tobacco, coffee, and tea stains
Extremely gentle, safe for natural enamel
Completely painless and rapid procedure
Delivers immediate freshness and natural shine

items.title: Zirconia Veneers
items.shortDesc: Metal-free, highly aesthetic zirconia crowns providing the closest light transmission to natural teeth.
items.longDesc: Zirconia veneers and crowns are fabricated from high-grade zirconium dioxide, a biocompatible porcelain-like material offering maximum fracture resistance. Lacking the metal substructure of traditional crowns, zirconia displays excellent light transmission properties, avoiding dark shadows near gum lines and yielding highly natural smile aesthetics.
benefits: Completely hypoallergenic, zero metal core
Leaves no dark shadows or gray margins on gums
Yields highly natural, tooth-like translucent look
Premium durability, ideal for back and front teeth

items.title: Dental Bridge
items.shortDesc: Traditional fixed restoration to bridge the gap created by one or more missing teeth.
items.longDesc: A dental bridge is a permanent prosthetic solution to replace one or more missing teeth. It anchors onto adjacent healthy teeth (which are minimally prepared and crowned to act as abutments), spanning the edentulous space with a false tooth (pontic) in between. It restores masticatory balance and stops neighboring shifts.
benefits: Quick and straightforward prosthetic phase
Restores lost chewing force immediately
Improves speech issues caused by missing teeth
Stabilizes surrounding teeth from drifting

items.title: Implant-Supported Dentures
items.shortDesc: Highly stable, implant-retained fixed or removable modern dentures for complete comfort.
items.longDesc: Implant-supported dentures are full or partial dental arches anchored securely onto dental implants (using locator snaps, ball attachments, or custom titanium bars). Unlike traditional loose dentures, implant-supported systems remain firmly in place, resolving slippage, painful gum rubbing, and restoring complete chewing confidence.
benefits: Never slips, wobbles, or pops out during meals
Restores speech clarity and normal chewing power
Palate-free design maintains absolute taste sensations
Feels highly secure and extremely natural

items.title: All-on-Four
items.shortDesc: Advanced protocol providing fixed temporary teeth on the same day using only 4 implants.
items.longDesc: The All-on-Four clinical concept allows the immediate rehabilitation of completely edentulous arches. By placing exactly 4 implants (two straight in the front, two tilted in the back to maximize bone contact), a full fixed provisional bridge is screwed onto the implants on the very same day. Perfect for patients presenting with moderate bone loss.
benefits: Walk out with fixed, loadable teeth on day one
Highly cost-effective, using fewer implants
Avoids extensive bone grafting operations
High immediate comfort, fast recovery rate

items.title: All-on-Six
items.shortDesc: Fixed hybrid bridge on 6 implants offering the highest chewing force and premium stability.
items.longDesc: The All-on-Six protocol is an ideal choice for full-arch tooth replacement when bone density is excellent. Six dental implants are strategically distributed across the upper or lower jaw to support a premium custom-screwed hybrid bridge. Having more anchoring points distributes chewing pressure more evenly, offering maximum lifetime durability.
benefits: Premium chewing force and ultimate stability
Excellent loading distribution for longevity
Undistinguishable from natural healthy teeth
100% fixed, non-removable prosthetic comfort

items.title: Overdenture
items.shortDesc: Snap-on removable dentures with enhanced retention supported by a few teeth or implants.
items.longDesc: An overdenture is a removable, highly retentive prosthetic appliance that sits over existing healthy tooth roots or a small number of dental implants (typically 2). Utilizing snap attachments, the overdenture clicks into place, providing excellent stability compared to standard suction-retained dentures while remaining easy to take out for hygiene.
benefits: Prevents dentures from sliding or clicking
Reduces localized gum sores and rubbing pain
Ideal conservative solution preserving roots
Extremely easy to clean and maintain

items.title: Prosthetic Dentistry
items.shortDesc: Custom-designed fixed or removable restorations to restore lost teeth and chewing function.
items.longDesc: Prosthodontics covers a broad clinical scope dedicated to restoring the oral functions and facial appearance of patients who have lost teeth. From classic complete dentures to modern partial dentures utilizing hidden attachments, every prosthesis is custom-crafted to blend with existing oral tissues and restore masticatory health.
benefits: Prevents facial sagging, restoring youthful lines
Corrects speech defects caused by tooth loss
Re-establishes efficient chewing pathways
Offers diverse prosthetic solutions for every budget

items.title: Teeth Whitening
items.shortDesc: In-office laser or custom take-home whitening to safely brighten teeth by several shades.
items.longDesc: Teeth whitening (bleaching) is a highly safe cosmetic treatment designed to clear deep organic and inorganic stains embedded in the microscopic pores of tooth enamel. Activating clinical bleaching gels using professional laser or LED lights, in-office whitening (taking under an hour) safe and quickly lightens tooth color by 3 to 4 shades.
benefits: Extremely fast results (under an hour in clinic)
Highly safe chemical formulas preserving enamel
Delivers long-lasting, bright, natural teeth shine
Instantly boosts social confidence and aesthetics

items.title: Laminate Veneers
items.shortDesc: Porcelain shell laminates applied to the front of teeth, requiring minimal preparation.
items.longDesc: Porcelain laminate veneers are paper-thin, custom-made ceramic shells bonded onto the front surface of teeth to correct color anomalies, chips, minor rotations, or diastemas. Requiring minimal shaving (usually 0.3 to 0.7 mm of enamel, or even none in prepless veneers), laminates mimic natural light reflections, delivering a flawless Hollywood smile.
benefits: Highly conservative, preserving natural tooth structure
Premium porcelain material remains stain-proof
Provides incredibly realistic, translucent aesthetics
Achieves a dramatic smile makeover in 7-10 days

items.title: Smile Design
items.shortDesc: A digital design process for a flawless and natural smile tailored to your facial features.
items.longDesc: Digital Smile Design utilizes professional, high-resolution portrait photography and 3D intraoral scans to meticulously plan and simulate the perfect smile before treatments begin. We analyze facial proportions, lip contours, gum lines, skin tone, and personal character to plan tailored treatments (veneers, whitening, gum contouring).
benefits: Preview and test the smile outcome before starting
100% custom design matching facial aesthetics
Achieves perfect balance between gums and teeth
Cohesive, step-by-step aesthetic treatment plan

items.title: TMJ Treatment
items.shortDesc: Protective splint therapies for jaw joint clicking, grinding, clenching, and joint pain.
items.longDesc: Temporomandibular joint (TMJ) disorders present through clicking sounds when opening the mouth, jaw lock, limited range of motion, chronic headaches, and ear pain. Often caused by subconscious teeth grinding (bruxism), trauma, or malocclusion, we treat conditions utilizing customized hard stabilization splints, physiotherapy, and botox.
benefits: Resolves embarrassing jaw joint clicking sounds
Allows comfortable, pain-free jaw movements
Relieves referred headaches, earaches, and neck pain
Prevents long-term severe joint capsule damage

items.title: Digital Dentistry
items.shortDesc: Fast, precise, and comfortable digital impressions using 3D scanners and CAD/CAM units.
items.longDesc: Digital dentistry replaces traditional, messy dental impressions (kaşık and hamur) with advanced 3D intraoral optical scanners and CAD/CAM fabrication units. In-office digital systems scan dentition in minutes, allowing restorations to be designed on-screen with micron-level precision and milled in automated high-speed milling machines.
benefits: Eliminates gag-inducing, sticky dental impression pastes
Ultra-fast, highly comfortable 3D scanning phase
Provides microscopic fit precision, eliminating error
Drastically cuts down appointment counts and time

items.title: Masseter Botox
items.shortDesc: Injections into the chewing muscle to relieve teeth grinding and clenching (bruksizm).
items.longDesc: Masseter Botox involves injecting botulinum toxin directly into the masseter (primary chewing) muscle. This temporarily relaxes the muscle, lowering involuntary grinding and clenching forces during sleep. This highly popular therapeutic procedure stops crown/tooth fractures, relieves jaw pain, and yields a slimmer, softer facial contour.
benefits: Substantially reduces nighttime clenching and grinding
Protects natural teeth and dental crowns from chipping
Slims down bulky masseter muscles, contouring the face
Painless, rapid injection completed in under 10 minutes

items.title: Night Guard
items.shortDesc: Custom transparent guard protecting teeth and joints from involuntary sleep grinding.
items.longDesc: A night guard (bruxism splint) is a custom-fitted, transparent protective appliance designed to be worn during sleep. By acting as a durable physical barrier between the upper and lower teeth, it absorbs intense clenching forces, protecting enamel from progressive attrition, preventing crown fractures, and easing stress on jaw joints.
benefits: Shields tooth enamel from severe wear and chipping
Prevents failure of dental fillings and restorations
Alleviates morning headaches and localized jaw tension
Very comfortable, lightweight, and easy to clean

cta.title: Which Treatment is Right for You?
cta.subtitle: Meet our specialist doctors with a free initial consultation, evaluate your oral health and let us create the most suitable treatment plan for you.

hero.title: Meet Our
hero.subtitle: Our specialist doctors, combining years of experience with modern technology, are redesigning your smile.

doctors.name: Dt. Esra Nehir Altıçek
doctors.title: Clinic Founder & General Dentist
doctors.bio: Graduating from Hacettepe University Faculty of Dentistry in 2014, Dt. Esra Nehir Altıçek has received domestic and international training in implantology and aesthetic dentistry. As the founder of Dentpol Söğütönü, she grows the clinic with a patient-centered and digital dentistry vision.

doctors.name: Spec. Dt. Ayşe Demir
doctors.title: Pedodontics Specialist
doctors.bio: Spec. Dt. Ayşe Demir, who specialized in pediatric dentistry, is known for her special communication techniques and game-supported treatment methods aimed at minimizing dental fear in children. Providing the most comfortable and safe treatment environment for her young patients is her priority.

doctors.name: Spec. Dt. Mehmet Çelik
doctors.title: Orthodontics Specialist
doctors.bio: Having completed his orthodontics specialization at Ege University, Spec. Dt. Mehmet Çelik holds advanced certificates in clear aligner (Invisalign) and modern fixed orthodontic treatments. He applies personalized treatment plans for patients of all ages.

cta.subtitle: You can make an appointment right away to meet with one of our specialist doctors.
